error_signature: display issue preventing onClick workflow trigger creation
title: Display issue with onClick workflow trigger in editor
symptom: Users are unable to create onClick workflow triggers due to a display issue in the new editor. The interface does not allow for the expected actions.
not_this_if: Using an older version of the editor
root_cause: The new editor has a display bug that prevents users from seeing the option to create onClick workflow triggers directly. However, the functionality still exists behind the scenes.
fix_steps: Select any template visible in the editor
Change the workflow trigger to onClick in the workflow settings
agent_instruction: Select a visible template and set the workflow trigger to onClick.
